content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-openrouter Daily Update (May 2, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development focused on resolving build compatibility issues. The team successfully addressed a critical dependency conflict by removing the broken CommonJS (CJS) build to ensure proper integration with the ESM-only `@elizaos/core` package.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Build System Improvements
*   Resolved a critical build failure by dropping the CJS bundle (`dist/cjs/index.node.cjs`). This change prevents the plugin from attempting to synchronously `require` the ESM-only `@elizaos/core` package, which utilizes top-level await. ([#26](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-openrouter/pull/26))

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
